description: Use the N/cache module to enable temporary, short-term storage of data. Using a cache improves performance by eliminating the need for scripts to repeatedly retrieve the same piece of data.

methods.name: getCache
methods.description: Checks for a cache object with the specified name. If the cache exists, returns the cache object. If not, creates and returns a new cache object.

params.name: options.name
params.description: The name of the cache to be retrieved or created. The maximum size is 1 KB.

params.name: options.scope
params.description: Sets the availability of the cache. Use the cache.Scope enum. Default is cache.Scope.PRIVATE.

enums.name: Scope
enums.description: Holds the string values that describe the availability of the cache.

members.name: PRIVATE
members.description: The cache is available only to the current script. This is the default value.

members.name: PROTECTED
members.description: The cache is available to all scripts in the same bundle, or to all scripts not in any bundle.

members.name: PUBLIC
members.description: The cache is available to all server scripts in the NetSuite account.

objectTypes.name: Cache
objectTypes.description: A segment of memory that can be used to store data on a temporary, short-term basis.

methods.name: get
methods.description: Retrieves a string value from the cache based on a key. If the value is not present, calls the user-defined loader function.

params.name: options.key
params.description: The key corresponding to the value to be retrieved from the cache.

params.name: options.loader
params.description: A user-defined loader function used to return the requested value when it is not present in the cache.

params.name: options.ttl
params.description: The maximum duration, in seconds, that a value retrieved by the loader can remain in the cache. Minimum is 300.

methods.name: put
methods.description: Puts a value into the cache. If the value is not a string, JSON.stringify() is used to convert it.

params.name: options.key
params.description: The key corresponding to the value to be placed in the cache.

params.name: options.value
params.description: The value to place in the cache. The maximum size is 500 KB.

params.name: options.ttl
params.description: The maximum duration, in seconds, that the value may remain in the cache. Minimum is 300.

methods.name: remove
methods.description: Removes a value from the cache.

params.name: options.key
params.description: The key corresponding to the value to be removed from the cache.

properties.name: scope
properties.description: The availability of the cache. Set using the cache.Scope enum.
